final_sql:
WITH seven_day_engagement AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT USER_PSEUDO_ID
  FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20201227
  WHERE EVENT_NAME = 'user_engagement' 
    AND EVENT_DATE >= '2020-12-31' 
    AND EVENT_DATE <= '2021-01-07'
),
two_day_engagement AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT USER_PSEUDO_ID
  FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20201227
  WHERE EVENT_NAME = 'user_engagement' 
    AND EVENT_DATE >= '2021-01-06' 
    AND EVENT_DATE <= '2021-01-07'
)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT sde.USER_PSEUDO_ID) AS distinct_users
FROM seven_day_engagement sde
LEFT JOIN two_day_engagement tde
ON sde.USER_PSEUDO_ID = tde.USER_PSEUDO_ID
WHERE tde.USER_PSEUDO_ID IS NULL;

final_sql:
WITH monthly_revenue AS (
  SELECT
    t1.trafficSource:source::STRING AS source,
    DATE_TRUNC('month', TO_DATE(t1.date, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS month,
    SUM(t1.totals:transactionRevenue::FLOAT) AS total_revenue
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170430 AS t1
  WHERE t1.date LIKE '2017%'
  GROUP BY source, month
),
source_revenue AS (
  SELECT
    source,
    SUM(total_revenue) AS total_revenue
  FROM monthly_revenue
  GROUP BY source
),
highest_source AS (
  SELECT
    source
  FROM source_revenue
  ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
  LIMIT 1
),
monthly_diff AS (
  SELECT
    MAX(total_revenue) - MIN(total_revenue) AS revenue_diff
  FROM monthly_revenue
  WHERE source = (SELECT source FROM highest_source)
)
SELECT
  (SELECT source FROM highest_source) AS highest_traffic_source,
  ROUND(revenue_diff / 1000000, 2) AS revenue_difference_millions
FROM monthly_diff;

final_sql:
WITH revenue_data AS (
  SELECT
    t1.trafficSource:source::string AS source,
    SUM(t1.hits:productRevenue::number) AS total_product_revenue
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170616 AS t1
  WHERE t1.date >= '2017-01-01' AND t1.date <= '2017-06-30'
  GROUP BY t1.trafficSource:source::string
),
top_source AS (
  SELECT source
  FROM revenue_data
  ORDER BY total_product_revenue DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('day', t1.date::date) AS day,
  DATE_TRUNC('week', t1.date::date) AS week,
  DATE_TRUNC('month', t1.date::date) AS month,
  SUM(t1.hits:productRevenue::number) / 1000000 AS product_revenue_millions
FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170616 AS t1
JOIN top_source ON t1.trafficSource:source::string = top_source.source
WHERE t1.date >= '2017-01-01' AND t1.date <= '2017-06-30'
GROUP BY day, week, month
ORDER BY product_revenue_millions DESC
LIMIT 1;

final_sql:
WITH session_classification AS (
  SELECT
    fullVisitorId,
    DATE_TRUNC('month', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS month,
    CASE
      WHEN (totals:transactions::NUMBER >= 1 AND hits:productRevenue IS NOT NULL) THEN 'purchase'
      ELSE 'non-purchase'
    END AS purchase_classification,
    totals:pageviews::NUMBER AS pageviews
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170408
  WHERE date >= '20170401' AND date <= '20170731'
)
SELECT
  purchase_classification,
  month,
  AVG(pageviews) AS average_pageviews
FROM session_classification
GROUP BY purchase_classification, month
ORDER BY month ASC;

final_sql:
WITH home_page_visits AS (
  SELECT
    t1.fullVisitorId,
    t1.visitId,
    t1.visitStartTime,
    t1_hits.value:page.pagePath::STRING AS pagePath,
    t1_hits.value:page.timeOnPage::NUMBER AS timeOnPage,
    LAG(t1_hits.value:page.pagePath::STRING) OVER (PARTITION BY t1.fullVisitorId, t1.visitId ORDER BY t1_hits.value:time) AS prevPagePath
  FROM
    GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170130 AS t1,
    LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t1.hits) AS t1_hits
  WHERE
    t1.trafficSource:campaign::STRING ILIKE '%Data Share%'
    AND t1_hits.value:page.pagePath::STRING LIKE '/home%'
),
next_page_visits AS (
  SELECT
    prevPagePath AS homePagePath,
    pagePath AS nextPagePath,
    timeOnPage
  FROM
    home_page_visits
  WHERE
    prevPagePath LIKE '/home%'
)
SELECT
  nextPagePath,
  COUNT(nextPagePath) AS visit_count,
  MAX(timeOnPage) AS max_time_on_home
FROM
  next_page_visits
GROUP BY
  nextPagePath
ORDER BY
  visit_count DESC;

final_sql:
WITH session_classification AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('month', TO_DATE(t1.date, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS month,
    t1.visitorId,
    CASE 
      WHEN t1.totals:transactions IS NOT NULL THEN 'purchase'
      ELSE 'non_purchase'
    END AS classification,
    t1.totals:pageviews::NUMBER AS pageviews
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170602 AS t1
  WHERE t1.date >= '20170601' AND t1.date <= '20170731' AND t1.totals:pageviews IS NOT NULL
),
visitor_pageviews AS (
  SELECT
    month,
    visitorId,
    classification,
    SUM(pageviews) AS total_pageviews
  FROM session_classification
  GROUP BY month, visitorId, classification
),
average_pageviews AS (
  SELECT
    month,
    classification,
    AVG(total_pageviews) AS avg_pageviews_per_visitor
  FROM visitor_pageviews
  GROUP BY month, classification
)
SELECT
  month,
  MAX(CASE WHEN classification = 'purchase' THEN avg_pageviews_per_visitor END) AS avg_pageviews_purchase,
  MAX(CASE WHEN classification = 'non_purchase' THEN avg_pageviews_per_visitor END) AS avg_pageviews_non_purchase
FROM average_pageviews
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY month ASC;
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -50.0; best score among failed candidates

WITH mobile_visits AS (
  SELECT
    fullVisitorId,
    visitStartTime,
    device
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160814
  WHERE device:deviceCategory ILIKE '%mobile%'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    fullVisitorId,
    visitStartTime,
    device
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20161114
  WHERE device:deviceCategory ILIKE '%mobile%'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    fullVisitorId,
    visitStartTime,
    device
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160822
  WHERE device:deviceCategory ILIKE '%mobile%'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    fullVisitorId,
    visitStartTime,
    device
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170114
  WHERE device:deviceCategory ILIKE '%mobile%'
),
user_visit_times AS (
  SELECT
    fullVisitorId,
    MIN(visitStartTime) AS first_visit_time,
    MAX(visitStartTime) AS last_visit_time
  FROM mobile_visits
  GROUP BY fullVisitorId
)
SELECT
  fullVisitorId,
  DATEDIFF('day', first_visit_time, last_visit_time) AS days_between
FROM user_visit_times
ORDER BY days_between DESC;

final_sql:
WITH monthly_data AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS month,
    TRY_TO_NUMBER(hits:pageviews) AS pageviews,
    TRY_TO_NUMBER(hits:transactionRevenue) AS transactions,
    TRY_TO_NUMBER(hits:productAddToCart) AS add_to_cart
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170430
  WHERE TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN '2017-01-01' AND '2017-03-31'
)
SELECT
  month,
  SUM(pageviews) AS total_pageviews,
  SUM(transactions) AS total_transactions,
  SUM(add_to_cart) AS total_add_to_cart,
  (SUM(transactions) / NULLIF(SUM(pageviews), 0)) * 100 AS purchase_conversion_rate,
  (SUM(add_to_cart) / NULLIF(SUM(pageviews), 0)) * 100 AS add_to_cart_conversion_rate
FROM monthly_data
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY month ASC;

WITH first_visits AS (
  SELECT
    fullVisitorId,
    MIN(visitStartTime) AS first_visit_time
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160804
  GROUP BY fullVisitorId
),
first_mobile_visits AS (
  SELECT
    fullVisitorId,
    MIN(visitStartTime) AS first_mobile_time
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160804
  WHERE device:deviceCategory::string = 'mobile'
  GROUP BY fullVisitorId
)
SELECT
  fv.fullVisitorId
FROM first_visits fv
JOIN first_mobile_visits fm
  ON fv.fullVisitorId = fm.fullVisitorId
WHERE fm.first_mobile_time > fv.first_visit_time;

final_sql:
WITH new_users AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT fullVisitorId
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160806
  WHERE date >= '2016-08-01' AND date <= '2017-04-30'
),
qualified_users AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT t1.fullVisitorId
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160806 t1
  JOIN GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160806 t2
  ON t1.fullVisitorId = t2.fullVisitorId
  WHERE t1.date >= '2016-08-01' AND t1.date <= '2017-04-30'
  AND t1.visitStartTime + 300 <= t2.visitStartTime
  AND t2.totals:transactions IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  COUNT(new_users.fullVisitorId) AS total_new_users,
  COUNT(qualified_users.fullVisitorId) AS qualified_new_users,
  (COUNT(qualified_users.fullVisitorId) / NULLIF(COUNT(new_users.fullVisitorId), 0)) * 100 AS percentage_qualified
FROM new_users
LEFT JOIN qualified_users
ON new_users.fullVisitorId = qualified_users.fullVisitorId;

final_sql:
WITH inventor_counts AS (
  SELECT
    spif_publication_number,
    ARRAY_SIZE(inventor) AS inventor_count,
    DATE_TRUNC('YEAR', TO_DATE(publication_date::VARCHAR, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS publication_year
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS
  WHERE inventor IS NOT NULL AND country_code = 'CA'
),
five_year_periods AS (
  SELECT
    spif_publication_number,
    inventor_count,
    CASE
      WHEN publication_year BETWEEN '1960-01-01' AND '1964-12-31' THEN '1960-1964'
      WHEN publication_year BETWEEN '1965-01-01' AND '1969-12-31' THEN '1965-1969'
      WHEN publication_year BETWEEN '1970-01-01' AND '1974-12-31' THEN '1970-1974'
      WHEN publication_year BETWEEN '1975-01-01' AND '1979-12-31' THEN '1975-1979'
      WHEN publication_year BETWEEN '1980-01-01' AND '1984-12-31' THEN '1980-1984'
      WHEN publication_year BETWEEN '1985-01-01' AND '1989-12-31' THEN '1985-1989'
      WHEN publication_year BETWEEN '1990-01-01' AND '1994-12-31' THEN '1990-1994'
      WHEN publication_year BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '1999-12-31' THEN '1995-1999'
      WHEN publication_year BETWEEN '2000-01-01' AND '2004-12-31' THEN '2000-2004'
      WHEN publication_year BETWEEN '2005-01-01' AND '2009-12-31' THEN '2005-2009'
      WHEN publication_year BETWEEN '2010-01-01' AND '2014-12-31' THEN '2010-2014'
      WHEN publication_year BETWEEN '2015-01-01' AND '2019-12-31' THEN '2015-2019'
      WHEN publication_year BETWEEN '2020-01-01' AND '2024-12-31' THEN '2020-2024'
    END AS five_year_period
  FROM inventor_counts
)
SELECT
  five_year_period,
  AVG(inventor_count) AS average_inventors_per_patent,
  COUNT(spif_publication_number) AS total_patent_count
FROM five_year_periods
GROUP BY five_year_period
ORDER BY five_year_period ASC;
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -50.0; best score among failed candidates

final_sql:
WITH AssigneeActivity AS (
  SELECT
    assignee,
    DATE_TRUNC('year', CAST(publication_number AS DATE)) AS year,
    COUNT(publication_number) AS patent_count
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS
  WHERE ARRAY_CONTAINS(cpc, 'A61')
  GROUP BY assignee, year
),
MostActiveAssignee AS (
  SELECT
    assignee,
    year,
    MAX(patent_count) AS max_patent_count
  FROM AssigneeActivity
  GROUP BY assignee, year
  ORDER BY max_patent_count DESC
  LIMIT 1
),
TopJurisdictions AS (
  SELECT
    assignee,
    country_code,
    COUNT(publication_number) AS patent_count
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS
  JOIN MostActiveAssignee
  ON assignee = MostActiveAssignee.assignee
  AND DATE_TRUNC('year', CAST(publication_number AS DATE)) = MostActiveAssignee.year
  WHERE ARRAY_CONTAINS(cpc, 'A61')
  GROUP BY assignee, country_code
  ORDER BY patent_count DESC
  LIMIT 5
)
SELECT LISTAGG(country_code, ', ') AS top_jurisdictions
FROM TopJurisdictions;
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -50.0; best score among failed candidates

final_sql:
WITH AssigneeApplications AS (
  SELECT
    assignee,
    DATE_TRUNC('YEAR', TRY_TO_DATE(filing_date::VARCHAR, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS filing_year,
    COUNT(application_number) AS application_count
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS
  WHERE uspc::TEXT ILIKE 'A61%'
  GROUP BY assignee, DATE_TRUNC('YEAR', TRY_TO_DATE(filing_date::VARCHAR, 'YYYYMMDD'))
),
MaxApplications AS (
  SELECT
    assignee,
    MAX(application_count) AS max_application_count
  FROM AssigneeApplications
  GROUP BY assignee
),
TopAssignee AS (
  SELECT
    assignee
  FROM MaxApplications
  ORDER BY max_application_count DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  aa.filing_year,
  aa.application_count
FROM AssigneeApplications aa
JOIN TopAssignee ta ON aa.assignee = ta.assignee
ORDER BY aa.application_count DESC
LIMIT 1;
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -50.0; best score among failed candidates

final_sql:
WITH AssigneeApplications AS (
  SELECT
    assignee_harmonized AS assignee,
    COUNT(application_number) AS total_applications
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS
  WHERE application_number LIKE 'A01B3%'
  GROUP BY assignee_harmonized
),
TopAssignees AS (
  SELECT
    assignee,
    total_applications
  FROM AssigneeApplications
  ORDER BY total_applications DESC
  LIMIT 3
),
YearlyApplications AS (
  SELECT
    assignee_harmonized AS assignee,
    DATE_TRUNC('year', CAST(application_number_formatted AS DATE)) AS application_year,
    COUNT(application_number) AS applications_per_year,
    country_code
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS
  WHERE application_number LIKE 'A01B3%'
  GROUP BY assignee_harmonized, application_year, country_code
),
MaxYearlyApplications AS (
  SELECT
    assignee,
    application_year,
    MAX(applications_per_year) AS max_applications,
    country_code
  FROM YearlyApplications
  GROUP BY assignee, application_year, country_code
)
SELECT
  ta.assignee,
  ta.total_applications,
  mya.application_year,
  mya.max_applications,
  mya.country_code
FROM TopAssignees ta
JOIN MaxYearlyApplications mya
ON ta.assignee = mya.assignee
ORDER BY ta.total_applications DESC;
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -50.0; best score among failed candidates

final_sql:
WITH monthly_filings AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('month', TO_DATE(filing_date::TEXT, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS filed_month,
    COUNT(publication_number) AS publication_count
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS
  WHERE abstract_localized::TEXT ILIKE '%internet of things%' 
    AND filing_date >= 20080000 
    AND filing_date < 20230000
  GROUP BY filed_month
)
SELECT 
  filed_month,
  COALESCE(publication_count, 0) AS publication_count
FROM (
  SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', DATEADD(month, seq4(), '2008-01-01')) AS filed_month
  FROM TABLE(GENERATOR(ROWCOUNT => 12 * (2022 - 2008 + 1)))
) AS months
LEFT JOIN monthly_filings USING (filed_month)
ORDER BY filed_month ASC;

WITH ForwardCitations AS (
  SELECT
    p.application_number,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.value:citing_application_number) AS forward_citation_count
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS p,
       LATERAL FLATTEN(input => p.citation) c
  WHERE p.grant_date >= 20100101 AND p.grant_date < 20110101
    AND c.value:citation_date <= p.filing_date + 100000
  GROUP BY p.application_number
)
SELECT
  application_number
FROM ForwardCitations
WHERE forward_citation_count = 1;

  SELECT
    TRIM(SUBSTRING(ipc_flat.value::TEXT, 1, 4)) AS ipc_code

  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => ipc) AS ipc_flat

    AND kind_code = 'B2' 
    AND DATE_TRUNC('month', TO_DATE(publication_number, 'YYYYMMDD')) BETWEEN DATE_TRUNC('month', '2022-06-01') AND DATE_TRUNC('month', '2022-08-31')
)
SELECT
  ipc_code,
  COUNT(ipc_code) AS ipc_count
FROM ipc_extracted
GROUP BY ipc_code
ORDER BY ipc_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

final_sql:
WITH FilteredPatents AS (
  SELECT
    t2.publication_number,
    t2.filing_date,
    COUNT(t1.cited_by) AS citation_count
  FROM PATENTS_GOOGLE.PATENTS_GOOGLE.ABS_AND_EMB AS t1
  INNER JOIN PATENTS_GOOGLE.PATENTS_GOOGLE.PUBLICATIONS AS t2 
    ON t1.publication_number = t2.publication_number
  WHERE t2.publication_number LIKE '%B2' 
    AND t2.filing_date BETWEEN 20100101 AND 20141231
  GROUP BY t2.publication_number, t2.filing_date
),
TopPatent AS (
  SELECT publication_number, filing_date
  FROM FilteredPatents
  ORDER BY citation_count DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
  tp.publication_number AS top_publication_number,
  tp.filing_date AS top_filing_date,
  t1.similar AS most_similar_patent
FROM TopPatent tp
JOIN PATENTS_GOOGLE.PATENTS_GOOGLE.ABS_AND_EMB t1 
  ON DATE_TRUNC('year', t1.publication_number) = DATE_TRUNC('year', tp.publication_number)
ORDER BY ARRAY_SIZE(t1.similar) DESC
LIMIT 1;
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -50.0; best score among failed candidates
